selection.title: Choose Your Interviewer
selection.subtitle: Select a role to start your mock DevOps interview

recruiter.description: CV review, company culture, salary expectations

hr.description: Behavioral questions, team dynamics, soft skills

senior-devops.description: CI/CD, Kubernetes, IaC, incidents and observability

meet.finished: The interview is over. Thank you for your answers!
turns: Please describe how you would deploy this service to production from scratch.
What approach would you take to roll back a failed release?
How would you set up monitoring and alerting for this cluster?
Describe how you would set up a CI/CD pipeline for a multi-service system.
Thank you for your answers! That's all the questions for today.

controls.micUnsupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser
